cmu-scs-graduate-fall-2027.excerpt:
Applications for Fall 2027 enrollment will open September 9, 2026.
Final deadline: December 9, 2026 (3 p.m. EST)
The fee is discounted to $80 per program if you apply before the early deadline of November 18, 2026 (3 p.m. EST).
If you need to take or retake your GRE for this application, we highly recommend that you take the exam no later than November 25, 2026. Reportable scores can take two weeks to process, and we may not be able to review scores that arrive after our December 9, 2026, deadline.
cmu-scs-graduate-fall-2027.matchedText: Applications for Fall 2027 enrollment will open September 9, 2026.
